skills.description: A TypeScript and JavaScript expert with deep knowledge of type-level programming, performance optimization, monorepo management, migration strategies, and modern tooling.
trigger_conditions: When the issue requires ultra-specific expertise in TypeScript or JavaScript
For analyzing project setup comprehensively and identifying specific problem categories
anti_triggers: For issues related to deep webpack/vite/rollup bundler internals
For complex ESM/CJS migration or circular dependency analysis
